title: Delicate Grassy Peruvian Quinoa Bowl
description: A flavorful and nutritious Peruvian dish featuring quinoa, sesame seeds, and fresh herbs, perfect for a brunch gathering. This ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly recipe is carefully prepared in a kadhai vessel.
instructions: Rinse the quinoa in a fine mesh strainer and drain well.
In a kadhai vessel, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the sesame seeds and cook, stirring frequently, until lightly toasted.
Add the quinoa to the kadhai vessel and cook, stirring constantly, for 2 minutes.
Add 2 cups of water to the kadhai vessel and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes or until the quinoa is tender.
Fluff the quinoa with a fork and stir in the chopped cilantro, scallions, lime juice, salt, and black pepper.
Crumble the brine-wet feta cheese over the quinoa mixture and serve immediately.
